import io
import string
import list

fn parse_ints(_ s: String) -> List<Int>
  mut result: List<Int> = []
  mut cur = ""
  mut i = 0
  let n = string.len(s)
  while i < n
    match string.byte_at(s, i)
    when Some(b)
      if b == 32 or b == 9 or b == 10 or b == 13
        if not string.is_empty(cur)
          match string.parse_int(cur)
          when Some(v)
            result = list.push(result, v)
          when None
            ()
          end
          cur = ""
        end
      else
        cur = "#{cur}#{string.from_byte(b)}"
      end
    when None
      ()
    end
    i = i + 1
  end
  if not string.is_empty(cur)
    match string.parse_int(cur)
    when Some(v)
      result = list.push(result, v)
    when None
      ()
    end
  end
  result
end

fn insert_sorted(_ xs: List<Int>, _ x: Int) -> List<Int>
  mut result: List<Int> = []
  mut inserted = false
  mut i = 0
  let n = xs.len()
  while i < n
    match xs.get(i)
    when Some(v)
      if not inserted and x <= v
        result = list.push(result, x)
        inserted = true
      end
      result = list.push(result, v)
    when None
      ()
    end
    i = i + 1
  end
  if not inserted
    result = list.push(result, x)
  end
  result
end

fn sort_list(_ xs: List<Int>) -> List<Int>
  mut sorted: List<Int> = []
  mut i = 0
  let n = xs.len()
  while i < n
    match xs.get(i)
    when Some(v)
      sorted = insert_sorted(sorted, v)
    when None
      ()
    end
    i = i + 1
  end
  sorted
end

fn format_list(_ xs: List<Int>) -> String
  mut out = ""
  mut j = 0
  let m = xs.len()
  while j < m
    match xs.get(j)
    when Some(v)
      if j == 0
        out = "#{v}"
      else
        out = "#{out} #{v}"
      end
    when None
      ()
    end
    j = j + 1
  end
  out
end

match io.read_line()
when Some(line)
  let xs = parse_ints(line)
  let sorted = sort_list(xs)
  println(format_list(sorted))
when None
  println("")
end
